security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' tauri: ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' tauri: ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Capture cognitive work context during interruptions
bundle.longDescription: A native macOS app that captures what you were working on when interrupted, and surfaces a structured resume card when you return.
